name: Chemay - Thirst Trap Physique body recomp

user._note: Set weight_kg and lean_status ('lean' or 'not_lean') then recompute daily_macros below.

daily_macros._note: Defaults from PDF example (80kg male, lean, 6 days/week, +10% surplus). Recompute with: protein = 1.2-1.6 * lbs; fat = cal*0.25/9; carbs = (cal - 4P - 9F)/4.

rules: Hit daily protein target — chicken, skyr, and eggs are the anchors
Keep fat at ~25% of calories — choose lean cuts and light condiments
Time carbs around workouts (oats, rice, potatoes near training)
Rotate at least 2 different lean protein sources across the week
Default to frozen berries for smoothies
Every meal should clear 25g protein minimum
Prefer whole-food carbs over processed; fries are a post-workout exception
Include skyr or Fage in at least 1 meal/day for cheap protein
All search terms must be Danish nemlig.com product names
avoid: Heavy oils and creamy sauces (high fat-to-protein ratio)
Refined snack foods that don't contribute to macros
Any item flagged as a personal intolerance (set in 'intolerances' below)
